label: Qwen3-ASR (oMLX, local)
note: Supports 30 languages including Hungarian (hu). See app/language_map.py for the full per-model language list. The `language_hint` field accepts full language names (e.g. "Hungarian"), not ISO codes. Leave empty for auto-detect.

fields.label: Language hint (optional)
fields.help: Leave empty for auto-detect (recommended -- this is a bidirectional pipeline, so locking to one language will misdetect the other). Verified live against oMLX's /v1/audio/transcriptions: correctly auto-detects both Chinese and English from the same model, with and without an explicit hint.
